name: Cobb Salad
tagline: Striped salad of chicken, bacon, blue cheese, egg, avocado, tomato
highlight: A whole meal in a bowl — protein, fat, fiber, no nuts

hero.alt: Cobb salad with rows of chicken, bacon, egg, avocado, and tomato
hero.caption: cobb — striped, plentiful

healthFacts: Protein-balanced: chicken + bacon + egg + cheese keeps you full for hours.
Avocado adds monounsaturated fat that helps absorb the fat-soluble vitamins.

steps.title: Cook bacon and eggs
steps.detail: Cook bacon in a skillet until crisp; drain on paper towels. Hard-boil eggs (12 minutes from cold start), shock in ice water, peel.
steps.tip: Peel eggs while still slightly warm — shells slip off cleanly.

media.alt: Bacon cooking and eggs in ice water
media.caption: cook bacon and eggs

steps.title: Whisk vinaigrette
steps.detail: Whisk vinegar, Dijon, salt, pepper. Slowly stream in olive oil until emulsified.
steps.tip: Cobb is traditional with blue-cheese dressing too — drop a few crumbles into the vinaigrette.

steps.title: Stripe the salad
steps.detail: Spread lettuce in a wide bowl. Lay diagonal stripes of chicken, bacon, halved eggs, avocado, tomato, and blue cheese.
steps.tip: Photographic Cobb is striped; eaten Cobb is tossed. Either is correct.

steps.title: Dress at the table
steps.detail: Drizzle vinaigrette right before serving. Toss at the table after admiring it briefly.
steps.tip: Dressing on the side keeps leftovers viable for next-day lunch.
